# Wilson AI

> AI Registry entry [AIR-40](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-40/wilson-ai) — status **Production** as of 2026-04-06. Departments: office-of-ceo.

**Category:** AI Legal Technology / Contract Review & Analysis
**Cost per User/Month:** $350 (Pro); Custom (Scale-Up, Enterprise)
**Departments:** Office of CEO, Legal

## Overview

Claren (formerly Wilson AI) — AI-powered legal technology platform for contract review, redlining, term extraction, legal Q&A. Based in London. Trusted by H&MV Engineering, Encompass, Peak Energy, Telecom Infrastructure Partners, Screencloud, Crowdcube.

## Capabilities

* AI-powered redlining — flag risks with edited wording based on negotiation stance
* Key term extraction with customisable templates
* Answers with citations
* AI playbook generation (Scale-Up tier)
* Custom contract term extraction
* Data room uploads (100/month on Pro)
* Multi-language, multi-jurisdiction
* Legal-tuned prompt library

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 compliant
* No training on user data — explicitly stated
* Enterprise-grade security claims
* SSO/SAML on Scale-Up and Enterprise
* Data partitions (Personas) on Scale-Up

## Pricing

* Pro: $350/user/month or $2,700/user/year (~$225/month equivalent)
* Scale-Up: Custom
* Enterprise: Custom

## Relevance to Janus Digital

As Janus expands across jurisdictions, contract review volume grows significantly. Multi-jurisdiction, multi-language contract review capability addresses this need. AI-powered redlining could dramatically reduce CEO/legal contract negotiation time. Citation-backed answers provide auditability under Section 5.3.1.

*Deployed to Office of CEO and Legal. Functional tier.*
